title: phaseolus coccineus var. striatus
intro: Phaseolus coccineus var. striatus, also known as scarlet runner bean or striped scarlet runner, is a variety of the Phaseolus coccineus plant, which is a type of climbing legume native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Phaseolus coccineus var. striatus include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce cholesterol, and provide antioxidant properties that can help protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Phaseolus coccineus var. striatus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, but more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
